meaning: To search for information online
example: Just Google it if you don't know the answer

meaning: When content spreads rapidly online
example: Her TikTok went viral overnight

spanish: transmitir en vivo / ver en streaming
meaning: To watch or broadcast content live online
example: I stream movies on Netflix every night

meaning: To accept or reject (from dating apps), now used broadly
example: I'd swipe right on that restaurant — it looks amazing

meaning: A private message on social media
example: She slid into my DMs to ask about the job

meaning: To suddenly stop all communication with someone
example: He ghosted me after three dates

meaning: Delay in internet connection or response time
example: The video call is lagging — I can't hear you properly

meaning: To move up or down through content on a screen
example: I spent two hours scrolling through TikTok

meaning: To watch many episodes of a show in one sitting
example: I binge-watched the entire season in one weekend

meaning: To disconnect from technology and relax
example: I need to unplug this weekend — no phone, no laptop

meaning: A clever shortcut or trick to solve a problem
example: Here's a life hack: freeze your grapes for a cool snack

meaning: An image of what's displayed on your screen
example: Take a screenshot and send it to me

meaning: Misleading headlines designed to get clicks
example: That article was total clickbait — the title was a lie

meaning: Unwanted messages or emails sent in bulk
example: My inbox is full of spam — I need to unsubscribe

meaning: Someone who posts inflammatory comments to provoke others
example: Don't feed the trolls — just ignore the negative comments

meaning: A viral image, video, or text shared online for humor
example: That cat meme has been everywhere this week

meaning: Anxiety that others are having fun without you
example: I have serious FOMO seeing everyone at the concert

spanish: hacerse pasar por otra persona online
meaning: To pretend to be someone else online, especially in dating
example: She was catfished — his profile photo was 10 years old

meaning: A small technical error or malfunction
example: There's a glitch in the app — it keeps crashing

meaning: A digital audio program available for streaming or download
example: I listen to podcasts during my commute

meaning: Compulsively scrolling through bad news online
example: I was doomscrolling at 3am and couldn't sleep

meaning: Computer systems that can perform tasks requiring human intelligence
example: AI is changing the way we work and learn

meaning: AI-generated fake video or audio of a real person
example: That video is a deep fake — it's not really the president

meaning: Someone with a large social media following who can affect trends
example: She's an influencer with 2 million followers on Instagram

meaning: A video blog documenting daily life or experiences
example: I started a travel vlog to share my adventures
